<content>1: package github.chains;
2: 
3: import com.github.javaparser.StaticJavaParser;
4: import com.github.javaparser.ast.CompilationUnit;
5: import com.github.javaparser.ast.expr.Expression;
6: import com.github.javaparser.ast.expr.FieldAccessExpr;
7: import com.github.javaparser.ast.expr.MethodCallExpr;
8: import com.github.javaparser.ast.visitor.VoidVisitorAdapter;
9: 
10: import java.io.File;
11: import java.io.IOException;
12: import java.nio.file.Files;
13: import java.nio.file.Paths;
14: import java.util.ArrayList;
15: import java.util.List;
16: 
17: public class Main {
18:     
19:     public static void main(String[] args) throws IOException {
20:         if (args.length < 1) {
21:             System.err.println("Usage: java github.chains.Main <path-to-java-file>");
22:             System.exit(1);
23:         }
24:         
25:         String filePath = args[0];
26:         File file = new File(filePath);
27:         
28:         if (!file.exists()) {
29:             System.err.println("File not found: " + filePath);
30:             System.exit(1);
31:         }
32:         
33:         System.out.println("Processing: " + filePath);
34:         
35:         CompilationUnit cu = StaticJavaParser.parse(file);
36:         
37:         FieldAccessToMethodTransformer transformer = new FieldAccessToMethodTransformer("status", "getStatus");
38:         transformer.visit(cu, null);
39:         
40:         if (transformer.getModifiedNodes().isEmpty()) {
41:             System.out.println("No modifications needed.");
42:         } else {
43:             System.out.println("Transformed " + transformer.getModifiedNodes().size() + " field access(es).");
44:             
45:             String modifiedCode = cu.toString();
46:             Files.write(Paths.get(filePath), modifiedCode.getBytes());
47:             System.out.println("File updated: " + filePath);
48:         }
49:     }
50:     
51:     static class FieldAccessToMethodTransformer extends VoidVisitorAdapter<Void> {
52:         private final String fieldName;
53:         private final String methodName;
54:         private final List<String> modifiedNodes = new ArrayList<>();
55:         
56:         public FieldAccessToMethodTransformer(String fieldName, String methodName) {
57:             this.fieldName = fieldName;
58:             this.methodName = methodName;
59:         }
60:         
61:         @Override
62:         public void visit(FieldAccessExpr fieldAccess, Void arg) {
63:             super.visit(fieldAccess, arg);
64:             
65:             System.out.println("Found FieldAccessExpr: " + fieldAccess.toString() + " with name: " + fieldAccess.getNameAsString());
66:             
67:             if (fieldName.equals(fieldAccess.getNameAsString())) {
68:                 Expression scope = fieldAccess.getScope();
69:                 
70:                 if (scope != null) {
71:                     MethodCallExpr methodCall = new MethodCallExpr(scope.clone(), methodName);
72:                     
73:                     boolean replaced = fieldAccess.replace(fieldAccess, methodCall);
74:                     System.out.println("Replace result: " + replaced);
75:                     if (replaced) {
76:                         modifiedNodes.add(fieldAccess.toString());
77:                         System.out.println("Replaced: " + fieldAccess.toString() + " -> " + methodCall.toString());
78:                     }
79:                 }
80:             }
81:         }
82:                 }
83:             }
84:         }
85:         
86:         public List<String> getModifiedNodes() {
87:             return modifiedNodes;
88:         }
89:     }
90: }

<content>1: package github.chains;
2: 
3: import com.github.javaparser.StaticJavaParser;
4: import com.github.javaparser.ast.CompilationUnit;
5: import com.github.javaparser.ast.expr.Expression;
6: import com.github.javaparser.ast.expr.FieldAccessExpr;
7: import com.github.javaparser.ast.expr.MethodCallExpr;
8: import com.github.javaparser.ast.visitor.VoidVisitorAdapter;
9: 
10: import java.io.File;
11: import java.io.IOException;
12: import java.nio.file.Files;
13: import java.nio.file.Paths;
14: import java.util.ArrayList;
15: import java.util.List;
16: 
17: public class Main {
18:     
19:     public static void main(String[] args) throws IOException {
20:         if (args.length < 1) {
21:             System.err.println("Usage: java github.chains.Main <path-to-java-file>");
22:             System.exit(1);
23:         }
24:         
25:         String filePath = args[0];
26:         File file = new File(filePath);
27:         
28:         if (!file.exists()) {
29:             System.err.println("File not found: " + filePath);
30:             System.exit(1);
31:         }
32:         
33:         System.out.println("Processing: " + filePath);
34:         
35:         CompilationUnit cu = StaticJavaParser.parse(file);
36:         
37:         FieldAccessToMethodTransformer transformer = new FieldAccessToMethodTransformer("status", "getStatus");
38:         transformer.visit(cu, null);
39:         
40:         if (transformer.getModifiedNodes().isEmpty()) {
41:             System.out.println("No modifications needed.");
42:         } else {
43:             System.out.println("Transformed " + transformer.getModifiedNodes().size() + " field access(es).");
44:             
45:             String modifiedCode = cu.toString();
46:             Files.write(Paths.get(filePath), modifiedCode.getBytes());
47:             System.out.println("File updated: " + filePath);
48:         }
49:     }
50:     
51:     static class FieldAccessToMethodTransformer extends VoidVisitorAdapter<Void> {
52:         private final String fieldName;
53:         private final String methodName;
54:         private final List<String> modifiedNodes = new ArrayList<>();
55:         
56:         public FieldAccessToMethodTransformer(String fieldName, String methodName) {
57:             this.fieldName = fieldName;
58:             this.methodName = methodName;
59:         }
60:         
61:         @Override
62:         public void visit(FieldAccessExpr fieldAccess, Void arg) {
63:             super.visit(fieldAccess, arg);
64:             
65:             System.out.println("Found FieldAccessExpr: " + fieldAccess.toString() + " with name: " + fieldAccess.getNameAsString());
66:             
67:             if (fieldName.equals(fieldAccess.getNameAsString())) {
68:                 Expression scope = fieldAccess.getScope();
69:                 
70:                 if (scope != null) {
71:                     MethodCallExpr methodCall = new MethodCallExpr(scope.clone(), methodName);
72:                     
73:                     boolean replaced = fieldAccess.replace(fieldAccess, methodCall);
74:                     System.out.println("Replace result: " + replaced);
75:                     if (replaced) {
76:                         modifiedNodes.add(fieldAccess.toString());
77:                         System.out.println("Replaced: " + fieldAccess.toString() + " -> " + methodCall.toString());
78:                     }
79:                 }
80:             }
81:         }
82:         
83:         public List<String> getModifiedNodes() {
84:             return modifiedNodes;
85:         }
86:     }
87: }

<path>/workspace/javaparser-base-template/src/main/java/github/chains/Main.java</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>1: package github.chains;
2: 
3: import com.github.javaparser.StaticJavaParser;
4: import com.github.javaparser.ast.CompilationUnit;
5: import com.github.javaparser.ast.expr.Expression;
6: import com.github.javaparser.ast.expr.FieldAccessExpr;
7: import com.github.javaparser.ast.expr.MethodCallExpr;
8: import com.github.javaparser.ast.visitor.VoidVisitorAdapter;
9: 
10: import java.io.File;
11: import java.io.IOException;
12: import java.nio.file.Files;
13: import java.nio.file.Paths;
14: import java.util.ArrayList;
15: import java.util.List;
16: 
17: public class Main {
18:     
19:     public static void main(String[] args) throws IOException {
20:         if (args.length < 1) {
21:             System.err.println("Usage: java github.chains.Main <path-to-java-file>");
22:             System.exit(1);
23:         }
24:         
25:         String filePath = args[0];
26:         File file = new File(filePath);
27:         
28:         if (!file.exists()) {
29:             System.err.println("File not found: " + filePath);
30:             System.exit(1);
31:         }
32:         
33:         System.out.println("Processing: " + filePath);
34:         
35:         CompilationUnit cu = StaticJavaParser.parse(file);
36:         
37:         FieldAccessToMethodTransformer transformer = new FieldAccessToMethodTransformer("status", "getStatus");
38:         transformer.visit(cu, null);
39:         transformer.applyTransformations();
40:         
41:         if (transformer.getModifiedCount() == 0) {
42:             System.out.println("No modifications needed.");
43:         } else {
44:             System.out.println("Transformed " + transformer.getModifiedCount() + " field access(es).");
45:             
46:             String modifiedCode = cu.toString();
47:             Files.write(Paths.get(filePath), modifiedCode.getBytes());
48:             System.out.println("File updated: " + filePath);
49:         }
50:     }
51:     
52:     static class FieldAccessToMethodTransformer extends VoidVisitorAdapter<Void> {
53:         private final String fieldName;
54:         private final String methodName;
55:         private final List<FieldAccessExpr> nodesToTransform = new ArrayList<>();
56:         private int modifiedCount = 0;
57:         
58:         public FieldAccessToMethodTransformer(String fieldName, String methodName) {
59:             this.fieldName = fieldName;
60:             this.methodName = methodName;
61:         }
62:         
63:         @Override
64:         public void visit(FieldAccessExpr fieldAccess, Void arg) {
65:             super.visit(fieldAccess, arg);
66:             
67:             if (fieldName.equals(fieldAccess.getNameAsString())) {
68:                 Expression scope = fieldAccess.getScope();
69:                 
70:                 if (scope != null && fieldAccess.isRegistered()) {
71:                     nodesToTransform.add(fieldAccess);
72:                     System.out.println("Marked for transformation: " + fieldAccess.toString());
73:                 }
74:             }
75:         }
76:         
77:         public void applyTransformations() {
78:             List<FieldAccessExpr> copy = new ArrayList<>(nodesToTransform);
79:             for (FieldAccessExpr fieldAccess : copy) {
80:                 if (!fieldAccess.isRegistered()) {
81:                     continue;
82:                 }
83:                 Expression scope = fieldAccess.getScope();
84:                 if (scope != null) {
85:                     MethodCallExpr methodCall = new MethodCallExpr(scope.clone(), methodName);
86:                     boolean replaced = fieldAccess.replace(fieldAccess, methodCall);
87:                     if (replaced) {
88:                         modifiedCount++;
89:                         System.out.println("Replaced: " + fieldAccess.toString() + " -> " + methodCall.toString());
90:                     } else {
91:                         System.out.println("Replace failed for: " + fieldAccess.toString());
92:                     }
93:                 }
94:             }
95:         }
96:             }
97:         }
98:         
99:         public void applyTransformations() {
100:             List<FieldAccessExpr> copy = new ArrayList<>(nodesToTransform);
101:             for (FieldAccessExpr fieldAccess : copy) {
102:                 if (!fieldAccess.isRegistered()) {
103:                     continue;
104:                 }
105:                 Expression scope = fieldAccess.getScope();
106:                 if (scope != null) {
107:                     MethodCallExpr methodCall = new MethodCallExpr(scope.clone(), methodName);
108:                     boolean replaced = fieldAccess.replace(fieldAccess, methodCall);
109:                     if (replaced) {
110:                         modifiedCount++;
111:                         System.out.println("Replaced: " + fieldAccess.toString() + " -> " + methodCall.toString());
112:                     } else {
113:                         System.out.println("Replace failed for: " + fieldAccess.toString());
114:                     }
115:                 }
116:             }
117:         }
118:         
119:         public int getModifiedCount() {
120:             return modifiedCount;
121:         }
122:     }
123: }

(End of file - total 123 lines)
</content>
